title: Roles Among the Train - TMM
description: An Addon to The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express, that adds more Roles to the game.
body:
Roles Among the Train

Roles Among the Train (or RAT for short) is a "The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express" addon that adds a few new roles.

## Features ### Adds 3 New Civillian Roles To The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express! - Toxicologist > - You can tell if something is poisoned. - Timekeeper > - You can see how much time is left of the round. - Apathetic > - You don't have a Mood. - Doctor > - You get a Medkit that can save someone's life. ## Credits - Link to the [Harpy Express Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express). - Link to the [HarpyModLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/harpymodloader), a library which the mod uses. - Check out [R4T's Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@doctor4t), it's awesome.
